title: SALES MANAGER
description:
Position: Sales Manager

Employment Type: Full-Time


Are you a dynamic and results-driven professional with a passion for Audio & Video solutions? AV Media PL is seeking an experienced Sales Manager to lead our sales efforts. If you have the expertise to drive business growth and build strong client relationships, we want to hear from you!


About Us:

AV Media PL is a leading provider of cutting-edge Audio & Video solutions, offering state-of-the-art technology to enhance communication, collaboration, and entertainment experiences. With a strong presence in the AV industry, we deliver high-quality, customised solutions tailored to meet the diverse needs of our clients.


Key Responsibilities:

· Develop and execute sales strategies to expand market presence.

· Identify and engage with potential clients, building and maintaining strong relationships.

· Drive sales growth by promoting tailored AV solutions.

· Lead sales presentations, product demonstrations, and negotiations.

· Collaborate with internal teams to deliver customised solutions.

· Stay updated on industry trends, competitor activities, and emerging technologies.

· Prepare sales reports, forecasts, and market analysis.


Requirements:

· Proven experience in AV or IT Sales, with a strong background in leading sales efforts across one or more of the following industries: Corporate, Education, Manufacturing, Interior Design, and IT.

· Strong understanding of Audio & Video technology solutions.

· Excellent communication, negotiation, and presentation skills.

· Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

· Strong networking and relationship-building skills.

· Willingness to travel as required.


Why Join Us?

· Competitive salary and attractive commission structure.

· Opportunity to work with industry-leading AV solutions.

· Career growth in a dynamic and innovative company.

· Collaborative and supportive work environment.


How to Apply: If you are ready to take on this exciting opportunity, send your resume and a cover letter to [avm@avmedia.com.sg]. Join AV Media PL and be a part of revolutionizing AV solutions!

postedCompany.description:
Established in 1992, AV MEDIA PTE LTD is based with a registered office in Bukit Batok, Singapore. The core business and focal point of AV MEDIA is the provision of IT and  Audio Visual Equipments. AV MEDIA proficient audio visual services range from providing Superior Professional Equipment and Audio Visual System Design to Skilled Production and Technical Support.


AV Media Mission Statement
We Ensure That Customers’ Needs Are Met With Maximum Satisfaction.

AV MEDIA always provide our customers with total solutions at a competitive price, within agreed time-scales and to exceed our worldwide customers’ expectation in everything we do.

AV MEDIA certainly hope that our existing products will be able to add values to your existing operations and products lines.


AV Media and Strategic Partners
AV MEDIA strikes strategic alliances with renowned manufacturers like LUMENS, SANHA, REACH and PANASONIC in the AV industry.
postedCompany.name: AV MEDIA PTE LTD

districts.location: D23 Hillview, Dairy Farm, Bukit Panjang, Choa Chu Kang
